mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.st :: StSettleAdj :: selectById */ a.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_sat.code_label AS adj_type_cd_nm FROM st_settle_adj a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sat ON cd_sat.code_grp = 'SETTLE_ADJ_TYPE' AND cd_sat.code_value = a.adj_type_cd WHERE a.settle_adj_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.ec.st :: StSettleAdj :: selectPageCount */ FROM st_settle_adj a
